landmarks.main_plane: dominant upper armor plane fit from source face measurements
landmarks.outer_boundary: manufactured low-control polygon from measured boundary stations
landmarks.socket: regularized cylinder from measured ring center/radius
landmarks.edge_returns: authored closed strips from measured side seam stations
landmarks.lower_hull_seam: authored closed seam bar from measured lower endpoints

hatch.reason: socket/ring/plate architecture must pass before hatch detail
